chain_edges.notes: Cloud-trained robot policies + 8h production runs both push humanoids past PoC; RaaS infra enables sustained uptime that RFP cuts will require.
Procurement-grade uptime requirements drive demand for cloud fleet management and per-robot compute line items.

relations.notes: Two facets of humanoid commercialization: procurement-side RFP cuts vs supply-side RaaS / cloud-training pivot.
Independent same-day theses: physical-AI procurement bar vs open-weight 1M context default.
Independent same-day theses: humanoid procurement bar vs SaaS valuation reset under agent displacement.
